metadata.purpose: Small paper/demo scenario regression set for FusionAgent scenario evidence.
metadata.scope: Stable building/road scenarios only; no self-evolution auto-tuning required.

cases.trigger_content: fuse building and road data for Parakou, Benin after an earthquake
cases.notes: Regression case for disaster-aware AOI parsing, building+road orchestration, evidence package generation, and graceful partial success.
